text.title: Ads Analytics Setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Ads Analytics Setup. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 20 events implemented ad-hoc; 6 months later naming inconsistent; analyst rewrites schema; historical data unusable.
antipattern.fix: Write spec doc with name / params / trigger / owner per event; freeze before coding.

antipattern.symptom: GA4 live 6 months; team links BigQuery now; first 6 months of raw events permanently lost.
antipattern.fix: Link BQ on day one of every new property; for legacy properties, link now and document the loss window.

antipattern.symptom: Source values include 'facebook', 'Facebook', 'FB', 'fb.com'; attribution splits across 4 buckets.
antipattern.fix: Document convention (lowercase, controlled vocab); validate at link-builder; backfill historical via lookup table.

antipattern.symptom: Conversion event misfires for 45 days; only discovered when budget reviewer asks why CPA looks great.
antipattern.fix: Wire DebugView verification step into release checklist; require screenshot evidence per event.
